title: plink
description:
One drop. Zero room for error.

Can you master the physics of the bounce? Position your two colored modifiers on the grid, map out the perfect trajectory, and drop the ball so it snaps perfectly into the rotating target.

The rules are dead simple, but hitting the mark is a true test of logic. Even at its most challenging, it’s the ultimate zero-stress experience—perfect for unwinding on the couch or passing the time on your daily commute.

::: FEATURES :::• 50 Brain-Teasing Levels: Test your spatial reasoning against clever layout progressions.

• Relaxing, Tactical Flow: No timers, no penalties. Solve completely at your own pace.

• Minimalist Mechanics: Simple tap-and-place controls that feel crisp and intuitive.
description_short: One drop. Zero room for error. Can you master the physics of the bounce?
